response.justification: Bogdan has extensive full-stack experience and a strong track record in developer tooling, open source contributions, and system design, but his resume shows minimal direct exposure to JVM ecosystems, Spring, or enterprise IDE tooling — key requirements for this role. His Java experience is mentioned only in passing, with no evidence of deep JVM internals or IDE subsystem work.
strengths: Proven experience in developer tooling and IDE-like systems (e.g., CI/CD, test runners, code generators)
Strong open source contributions and technical communication skills (workshops, talks, public projects)
Deep systems thinking across languages and platforms, including low-latency and distributed systems
concerns: Lack of demonstrated expertise in Spring, Hibernate, or other enterprise Java frameworks
No clear evidence of work on JVM-based IDE internals, language servers, or code analysis tooling
Java appears as a minor skill among many; no projects or roles highlight deep JVM or Kotlin proficiency
